characters.appearance: Two hands with a dark complexion holding a smartphone. Only the hands and lower arms are visible.
characters.demeanor: Actively tapping and swiping on the phone screen.

scenes.supernova_script: Narrator says: क्या आप भी English बोलने में घबराते हैं? रोज़ practice करें और अपना डर खत्म करें! [Do you also feel nervous speaking English? Practice daily and end your fear!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the common fear of speaking English.
- Replaces the competitor's scammy 'get rich quick' visual context with a gamified 'Daily Learning Topic' spinner.
- Sets a warm, encouraging tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलने का डर खत्म करने के लिए Download कीजिये Supernova App 🎯 (To end the fear of speaking English Download Supernova App 🎯)
Daily Practice - 20:00
Supernova Tutor
+ 50 XP
Credited to your streak
MARK AS READ
VIEW PROFILE
DAILY TOPIC SPINNER
2 practice sessions available
Interview
Office
Friends

scenes.supernova_script: Narrator says: Office के messages हों या emails, अब हर बात आसानी से समझें और AI tutor के साथ confidently reply करना सीखें। [Whether it's office messages or emails, now understand everything easily and learn to reply confidently with an AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates practical, real-world utility by showing an office message instead of a fake bank alert.
- Highlights the app's ability to help users understand and respond to English in professional settings.
- Shifts the emotion from financial greed to professional confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Office Group

Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted...

Chat with AI Tutor

scenes.supernova_script: Narrator says: आज ही Supernova डाउनलोड करें और बिना डरे, confidently English बोलें! [Download Supernova today and speak English confidently, without fear!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action.
- Reinforces the brand promise of speaking with confidence.
- Directs the user to the app store to begin their learning journey.
